channelMetadataRenderer.title: Wild Moose
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Become the Best Version of Yourself!

My name is Yuaheni Los, I calisthenics athlete, work as a firefighter and I shoot a video with training on the YouTube Channel.

I am a multiple champion of the Republic of Belarus in street workout and a two-time record holder of the National Guinness World Records

I am 1990 , weight 75kg, height 175cm
I have been training more 20 years without a break

Subscribe to my CHANNEL, because it's easy for you, but I'm pleased😊
